title: Niota pendula

The classification of Niota pendula is further refined to the genus Niota, which is a part of the larger family of Hamamelidaceae. This classification is based on the plant's morphological characteristics and genetic makeup. As a member of the Hamamelidaceae family, Niota pendula is closely related to other flowering plants in this family.
